company.name: StartupSauce B2B SaaS Founder Community - Join Now
company.description:
# StartupSauce B2B SaaS Founder Community

## Meet Other Successful Founders Outside Silicon Valley

Building a SaaS business is hard… **but you don’t have to do it alone**.  
Learn from other founders. Get introductions. Build partnerships.

[JOIN NOW](https://startupsauce.typeform.com/to/ITtEsZ)

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/reBezLiGRguwy10w4Mgl_Banner-HPCORTO.png)

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/2153786043/settings_images/12d1673-03d3-cf77-4a4-402a4c3342b4_Icon_with_links_1_.png)

FREE RESOURCE DOWNLOAD

### 320+ Places To Submit Your SaaS

Need more traffic and backlinks? Submit your SaaS to the sites on this list for a quick and easy SEO boost.  

[DOWNLOAD NOW](https://startupsauce.com/resource_redirect/landing_pages/2150147874)

## Why Join StartupSauce Academy?

**  
StartupSauce Academy is a private community for SaaS founders outside Silicon Valley.**  
We don’t allow direct competitors to join, so you can openly and honestly discuss things you wouldn’t share publicly – like financials, conversion & churn rates, growth hacks you discovered and more.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/WFnjPpWMRZqozyKPzOr4_feature1.png)

#### Private SaaS Founder Community

**Connect with other SaaS founders online** via our active & engaged Slack group, Zoom calls, and via IRL meetups & events.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/hbgmAiJPQ9CAvqx8rXC4_feature2.png)

#### Free 60-Min Consultation

Get a custom **marketing audit** when you join + a lead generation **plan** based on what’s working for other founders.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/lxQDr2uZQB4TXIUzmpxB_feature3.png)

#### Regular Mastermind Calls

Join a mastermind group and meet regularly with other SaaS founders to **get advice & share your expertise.**

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/hpugFFqRouoj47lbY21A_feature4.png)

#### Monthly Events & Workshops

Each month **we do fireside chats with experts, member knowledge-shares, hotseat calls, speed networking** and other events.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/0rI8OGXRfOi2m6tqpRHQ_feature5.png)

#### Access to Members-Only Content

**Level up your knowledge** via our video library, training courses, templates & swipe files, and much more.

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/JdDl9y3YS4dTOT1z7Huq_feature6.png)

#### Exclusive Discounts & Special Offers

**Save money** on software tools and services from our recommended providers & **partners** and get access to exclusive offers.

## Meet Some of Our Members

100+ SaaS founders in 16 countries have already joined. Will you?

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/rxPzr34kQwyuZy33fwrb_member1.png)

#### KELVIN MAH

**RankBreeze.com  
**Vancouver, Canada

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/PjKvZGmQwCLNtc6VnVtr_member2.png)

#### JONATHAN "JZ" ZACKS

**GoReminders.com  
**New York, USA

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/ZuYoo6TTSpyMdwgDKPcJ_member3.png)

#### ROBERT GELB

**HeySummit.com  
**Edinburgh, UK

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/gDh8lVhCSySwKLFkq0Hw_member4.png)

#### GLAUBER RAMOS

**FunRetro.io  
**Porto Alegre, Brazil

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/chBKUvNdQdeuFLdq35bd_member5.png)

#### UWE DREISSIGACKER

**InvoiceBerry.com  
**Valencia, Spain

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/fNh9BHOxSrSz2ifnmG39_member6.png)

#### CHRIS RAETHKE

**Notiv.com  
**Brisbane, Australia

## Who Should Join?

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/ejHrwdvmQGlKT7ZmX7uW_31.png)

#### You SHOULD Apply if...

*   You’re a **Founder**, Co-Founder or CEO
*   You run a **SaaS** business
*   You’re generating **at least $5K MRR**
*   You’re willing to listen to others and implement what you learn
*   You’re willing to share your knowledge and expertise to help other founders

![](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/themes/3552515/settings_images/dqAM3i8jQIaiE8Wc8Pc9_cross2.png)

#### You SHOULD NOT Apply if...

*   You’re an employee
*   You're a consultant, coach, agency, or other service provider
*   You run a non-SaaS business
*   You’re doing less than $5K MRR
*   You’re a lurker and don't plan to connect with other founders

**  
Note:** If you meet all the other criteria but aren’t quite at the $5K MRR level yet, join the waitlist and we’ll send you some guides and video content to help you get to $5K faster.  
   
Also if you’ve done something awesome – like sold a previous business – apply anyway and tell us about it. We might bend the rules a little, you never know.

[JOIN NOW](https://startupsauce.typeform.com/to/ITtEsZ)

## What Our Members Say

![Video Thumbnail](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/3552515/settings_images/be8c7-1c6f-6201-650f-4f0452e74b5_3.png)

![Video Thumbnail](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/3552515/settings_images/b104c85-3a-0255-e5a8-c60156b228a_2.png)

![Video Thumbnail](https://kajabi-storefronts-production.kajabi-cdn.com/kajabi-storefronts-production/file-uploads/themes/3552515/settings_images/24311c-0576-3f05-b36a-3dd122d48208_5.png)

## Our Value
